OpenAI launches a new enterprise research system

OpenAI introduced a new enterprise research system designed to help analyst teams collect, organize, and review fast-moving market evidence from trusted publications.

The product combines source provenance with a decision-focused workflow, allowing researchers to inspect every underlying report before they share a conclusion.

Early teams said the review controls reduced duplicated work and made it easier to distinguish a new development from repeated coverage of an earlier announcement.

The company plans to expand language support and administrative controls after the first internal deployment is evaluated by enterprise customers.
